meta.title: US 50 States + DC — Payroll Tax Summary 2026
meta.sources: State DOR/DOL pages, Tax Foundation 2026 summary, ADP/Paychex state charts
meta.note: Income tax rates and SUI wage bases as of 2026. Minimum wages effective Jan 2026 unless noted. Some indexed values marked 'uncertain' where 2026 publication pending.

states.name: Alabama
states.notable: No state minimum wage; federal $7.25 applies; overtime exempt from state income tax

states.name: Alaska
states.notable: No state income tax; employee also contributes 0.50% to SUI

states.name: Arizona
states.notable: Flat tax since 2023; min wage indexed annually

states.name: Arkansas
states.notable: Top rate reduced from 4.4% in recent cuts

states.name: California
states.notable: Highest top marginal rate; SDI tax uncapped since 2024; fast-food ($20) and healthcare ($21-25) industry-specific min wages

states.name: Colorado
states.notable: FAMLI paid leave premium 0.9% split employer/employee

states.name: Connecticut
states.notable: Paid FMLA 0.5% employee contribution; min wage indexed to federal ECI

states.name: Delaware
states.notable: Paid Leave program contributions began 2025

states.name: District of Columbia
states.notable: Paid Family Leave 0.75% employer tax; min wage indexed July 1 annually

states.name: Florida
states.notable: No state income tax; min wage reaches $15 Sept 2026 per constitutional amendment

states.name: Georgia
states.notable: Moved to flat tax 2024; phasing to 4.99%; state min $5.15 but federal preempts

states.name: Hawaii
states.notable: TDI (temporary disability) required; min wage rises to $16 in 2028

states.name: Idaho
states.notable: Moved to flat tax 2023

states.name: Illinois
states.notable: Personal Property Replacement Tax separate for businesses; Chicago local min wage higher

states.name: Indiana
states.notable: All 92 counties levy additional local income tax (0.5%-3.38%)

states.name: Iowa
states.notable: Moved to flat tax 2026 (from progressive)

states.name: Kansas
states.notable: Simplified to 2 brackets in 2024 reform

states.name: Kentucky
states.notable: Rate reduced from 4% in 2026; local occupational taxes common

states.name: Louisiana
states.notable: Moved to flat tax 2025; federal income tax deductibility eliminated

states.name: Maine
states.notable: Paid Family Leave 1% began 2025

states.name: Maryland
states.notable: All counties levy local income tax (2.25%-3.2%); FAMLI launching 2026

states.name: Massachusetts
states.notable: Millionaire's tax adds 4%; PFML 0.88% split

states.name: Michigan
states.notable: Several cities levy local income tax (Detroit 2.4%)

states.name: Minnesota
states.notable: Paid Family and Medical Leave launches Jan 2026 at 0.88% split

states.name: Mississippi
states.notable: Phasing down toward 3% by 2030; first $10k of taxable income exempt

states.name: Missouri
states.notable: Top rate phasing down; Kansas City and St Louis have 1% earnings tax

states.name: Montana
states.notable: Simplified to 2 brackets 2024

states.name: Nebraska
states.notable: Top rate phasing down to 3.99% by 2027

states.name: Nevada
states.notable: No state income tax; Modified Business Tax on payroll >$50k/quarter

states.name: New Hampshire
states.notable: No wage income tax; interest/dividends tax fully repealed 2025

states.name: New Jersey
states.notable: Employee SUI/SDI/FLI contributions required

states.name: New Mexico
states.notable: Paid Family Medical Leave approved, launches 2028

states.name: New York
states.notable: NYC adds 3.078%-3.876% local tax; Yonkers surcharge; PFL employee contribution

states.name: North Carolina
states.notable: Rate scheduled to drop toward 3.99% by 2027

states.name: North Dakota
states.notable: Lowest top progressive rate in US; large zero bracket

states.name: Ohio
states.notable: Moving toward flat tax; extensive local/municipal income taxes via RITA/CCA

states.name: Oklahoma
states.notable: Flat tax legislation pending

states.name: Oregon
states.notable: Statewide transit tax 0.1%; Paid Leave Oregon 1% split; 3-tier min wage by region

states.name: Pennsylvania
states.notable: Employee SUI 0.07%; Local Earned Income Tax everywhere; Philadelphia wage tax ~3.75%

states.name: Rhode Island
states.notable: TDI/TCI employee contribution 1.2%

states.name: South Carolina
states.notable: Top rate phasing toward 6% then flat 3.99% long-term goal

states.name: South Dakota
states.notable: No state income tax; min wage indexed annually

states.name: Tennessee
states.notable: No wage income tax; Hall investment tax fully repealed 2021

states.name: Texas
states.notable: No state income tax; constitutional prohibition passed 2019

states.name: Utah
states.notable: Rate reduced from 4.65% in recent sessions

states.name: Vermont
states.notable: Child Care Contribution payroll tax 0.44% employer + 0.11% employee

states.name: Virginia
states.notable: Bracket thresholds unchanged since 1990; min wage phased to $15 by 2026

states.name: Washington
states.notable: No wage income tax; Paid Family Medical Leave 0.92%; WA Cares LTC 0.58%

states.name: West Virginia
states.notable: Rate cut triggers tied to revenue

states.name: Wisconsin
states.notable: No local income taxes; state min wage matches federal

states.name: Wyoming
states.notable: No state income tax; SUI base indexed
